description: Performance baseline thresholds for PropChain CI regression detection

notes.max_register_ms: Maximum allowed time for a single property registration
notes.max_transfer_ms: Maximum allowed time for a property transfer
notes.max_query_ms: Maximum allowed time for a property query
notes.min_success_rate_percent: Minimum percentage of operations that must succeed under load
notes.min_ops_per_second: Minimum throughput required during load tests
